sections.content:
OK so state 31 DOES have the purple bar (color 'p'). My earlier query only checked for 'P' (uppercase), not 'p' (lowercase). That's why I thought there was no purple bar in any state.
So the purple bar has been there all along. The right green is at col 30, purple bar at cols 33-38, and the right frame area starts at col 39.
Now I need to figure out how to get the right green past the purple bar. The purple bar spans rows 21-41, and the green is at rows 30-32.
Options:
1. Move the green UP to go above the purple bar (row < 21)
2. Move the green DOWN to go below the purple bar (row > 41)
3. Some other mechanic to remove or move the purple bar
Let me check what actions are available from state 31 and what hasn't been tried yet. I should also check if there are any unexplored paths from earlier states that might lead to a solution.
Actually, let me first check what actions have been tried from state 31.

sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
State 31 has no tried actions and no neighbors. This means I just arrived at state 31 and haven't tried any actions from here yet.
The frontier shows all states are frontier states, which means no state has been fully explored (all have untried actions).
Now, let me think about the game mechanics:
1. Click on a green to select it (clicking on the edge, not the center)
2. Use arrow keys to move the selected green
3. When a green is blocked by an obstacle, pressing the arrow key swaps the center colors of the two greens
4. The goal is to get both greens into their respective frames
Currently:
- Left green at cols 12-14 with c (charcoal) center - this is in the left frame area
- Right green at cols 30-32 with W (white center) - needs to reach the right frame (cols 44-48)
- Purple bar at cols 33-38 blocks the right green
To get the right green past the purple bar, I need to move it UP or DOWN to go around it. The purple bar spans rows 21-41.
Let me try:
1. Click on the right edge of the right green (31, 32) to select it
2. Press UP multiple times to move it above the purple bar
3. Then press RIGHT to move it past the purple bar
4. Then press DOWN to move it into the right frame
But wait, earlier when I clicked on (31, 30) and pressed RIGHT, nothing happened to the green. Let me try clicking on the right edge (31, 32) and then pressing UP.
Actually, let me first check what the selection mechanism is. From the state graph, I can see that state 0 -> state 1 was MOUSE(row=31, col=28), which clicked on the center of the right green (initially at cols 27-29). This swapped the centers.
So clicking on the center swaps colors, and clicking on the edge selects for movement.
Let me try clicking on the right edge of the right green (31, 32) and then pressing UP.

sections.content:

<parameter=code>

# Right green is at cols 30-32, rows 30-32
# Click on right edge: (31, 32)
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 31, 'col': 32}, 'UP'])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
